summary: Investor Module implementation verified successfully. All 15 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests passed - Annual Plan tab, Monthly Update tab, FY selector, Save functionality, Comments system all working. Swiss design verified (rounded-none, monospace fonts, slate borders).
seed_data_creation: Test data created during tests (comments, plan updates) - cleaned up where applicable
context_for_next_testing_agent: Investor Module fully implemented and tested. Backend endpoints: GET/PUT /api/investor/plan, GET/PUT /api/investor/monthly/{year}/{month}, GET/POST/DELETE /api/investor/comments. Frontend: InvestorDashboard.js at /investor-dashboard with Annual Plan and Monthly Update tabs. CEO/Director/Admin roles can edit, Investor role is read-only. Swiss design with rounded-none, JetBrains Mono for numbers, 1px slate borders.

Backend_API_Tests.GET_plan_default_fy: PASSED - Returns plan with auto_computed CRM metrics
Backend_API_Tests.PUT_plan_ceo_role: PASSED - CEO can save plan, data persists
Backend_API_Tests.GET_monthly_update: PASSED - Returns monthly with actuals, targets, overrides
Backend_API_Tests.POST_comments: PASSED - Adds comment with author info
Backend_API_Tests.RBAC_ceo_can_edit: PASSED - CEO role can edit plan

Frontend_UI_Tests.Annual_Plan_tab: PASSED - Shows CRM Live Data, FY Targets (7 cards), Revenue Build-Up, P&L Statement
Frontend_UI_Tests.Monthly_Update_tab: PASSED - Shows month navigator, 4 quick stats, Monthly P&L table
Frontend_UI_Tests.FY_selector: PASSED - Dropdown changes FY, data reloads
Frontend_UI_Tests.Save_button: PASSED - Visible in Editor mode, saves data with success toast
Frontend_UI_Tests.Navigation_sidebar: PASSED - 'Investor Dashboard' link present and highlighted when active
Frontend_UI_Tests.Edit_fields_CEO: PASSED - 11 editable actual inputs in Monthly P&L, 10 priority/risk inputs, 6 support fields
Frontend_UI_Tests.Comments_system: PASSED - Add comment button, input field, submit works, comment displays
